name: python3-ldapdomaindump
title: python3-ldapdomaindump
summary: Active Directory information dumper via LDAP (Python 3)
description:
Active Directory information dumper via LDAP (Python 3)
This package contains an Active Directory information dumper via LDAP. In an
Active Directory domain, a lot of interesting information can be retrieved via
LDAP by any authenticated user (or machine). This makes LDAP an interesting
protocol for gathering information in the recon phase of a pentest of an
internal network. A problem is that data from LDAP often is not available in
an easy to read format.
.
ldapdomaindump is a tool which aims to solve this problem, by collecting and
parsing information available via LDAP and outputting it in a human readable
HTML format, as well as machine readable json and csv/tsv/greppable files.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ldapdomaindump because Active Directory information dumper via LDAP (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ldapdomaindump as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `ldapdomaindump [options] [args]` as documented upstream for ldapdomaindump.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ldapdomaindump with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ldapdomaindump --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
